prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor.

Scene: a three-stage timeline about researching a listed company. Stage 1: mail, phone, newspaper. Stage 2: search engine, finance website, forum. Stage 3: AI summarizes reports into key points. Avilia walks along the timeline, upgrading tools.

Core meaning: information collection evolved from slow offline methods to internet search to AI-assisted absorption.

Style: clean editorial Chinese blog illustration, white background, black/red/white, small blue AI glow. Minimal labels: "线下", "互联网", "AI".

Avoid dense history chart, avoid real company logos.
